title: Referred publications 2017
description: You may need to refer to some of these publications and rulings to prepare your 2017 tax return.
keywords: Publication, Rulings and determinations, TaxPack, Tax return, TaxTime, 2017 tax time, 2017, 2017 tax return

content_blocks.text: To help you complete your 2017 tax return, we have provided a list of other publications that will help you to understand your tax obligations and complete your tax return. Some publications are essential to complete some items.

items: Attribution managed investment trust (AMIT) tax return instructions 2017
Attribution managed investment trust member annual statement and standard distribution statement: guidance notes for trustees 2017
Family trust election, revocation or variation 2017
Franking account tax return and instructions 2017
Guide to foreign income tax offset rules 2017
Interest on early payments and overpayments of tax 2017
Non individual PAYG payment summary schedule 2017
Personal investors guide to capital gains tax 2017
Refund of franking credits for individuals - application form 2017
Refund of franking credit instructions and application for individuals 2017
Research and development tax incentive schedule 2017
Research and development tax incentive schedule instructions 2017
Self-managed superannuation fund annual return instructions 2017
Strata title body corporate tax return and instructions 2017
Timor Sea Treaty – Joint Petroleum Development Area instructions 2017
Using the capital gain or capital loss worksheet

content_text:
To help you complete your 2017 tax return, we have provided a list of other publications that will help you to understand your tax obligations and complete your tax return. Some publications are essential to complete some items.
## Popular publications
- Individual tax return instructions
## Publications
- Attribution managed investment trust (AMIT) tax return instructions 2017
- Attribution managed investment trust member annual statement and standard distribution statement: guidance notes for trustees 2017
- Business and professional items 2017
